must_detect.matched_text: We process personal data under the PDPA (information relating directly or indirectly to an identified or identifiable data subject), including names, NRIC/Passport, contact details, and device IDs collected in employment, financing and deal documentation.

MNPI handling: pre-announcement financing materials (e.g., sukuk term sheet ref TS/2026/MB/001 and draft facility agreement FA/2026/HK/018) are restricted to insiders subject to blackout and wall-crossing under CMSA s.188 and Bursa LR 9.03.

Retention: HR records (NRIC, passport scans, payroll) retained 7 years post-termination; financing/deal files held 7 years post-completion or Bursa/CMSA limitation, whichever is longer; redaction applies before external disclosure.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: MY Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
